title: Lomita Chamber of Commerce
description: Smart Details Auto Spa is a proud member of the Lomita Chamber of Commerce, demonstrating our commitment to supporting and serving the local South Bay community. This membership signifies that we meet the Chamber's standards for business excellence and ethical practices, while actively contributing to the economic growth of Lomita and surrounding areas. For our customers, this means you're choosing a locally-invested business that values community relationships and maintains high professional standards.
